evals.name: right-person-wrong-seat
evals.prompt: We've got a guy on our crew who's amazing at installs but terrible at managing people. We promoted him to ops manager and it's been rough. What does EOS say about this?
evals.expected_output: Should identify this as a Right Person, Wrong Seat problem, reference the GWC filter (fails Want It or Capacity), recommend moving him back to a technical role, and mention the Accountability Chart

evals.name: l10-meeting-setup
evals.prompt: I want to set up a weekly leadership meeting at Advosy. What should the agenda look like and how long should it take?
evals.expected_output: Should describe the Level 10 Meeting format: 90 minutes, 7-segment agenda (Segue, Scorecard, Rock Review, Headlines, To-Do List, IDS, Conclude) with time allocations, emphasize same day/time every week

evals.name: too-many-priorities
evals.prompt: Our leadership team can't seem to agree on priorities. We come out of every quarterly planning meeting with 15 things we want to do and nothing gets finished.
evals.expected_output: Should reference Rocks (limit to 3-7), the 90-Day World concept, IDS for resolving disagreements, and the Covey rocks/sand analogy. Should emphasize that less is more and each Rock needs one owner.
